docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT INSTACART

REMARK: EXHIBITS RECIEVED FROM UNKNOWN PARTY.

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM IS GRANTED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM ANGEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY DIAZ, ADAM ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT INSTACART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT INSTACART

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-02-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ADAM ANGEL DIAZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INSTACART IS PRESENT APPEARING BY ZOOM IS BRIANNA AVILA. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INSTACART

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM ANGEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INSTACART STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
